message:
feat(fcp-e2e): add E2E compliance tests for 47 connectors

Extends E2E coverage from 32 to 79 connectors. Each test file exercises
default-deny capability enforcement, happy-path invoke, and manifest
network constraint validation (host_allow, deny_localhost, deny_private_ranges,
require_sni).

New connectors covered: reddit, sentry, hubspot, homeassistant, docusign,
spotify, kubernetes, terraform, pulumi, pandadoc, bitwarden, intercom,
1password, algolia, amplitude, annas-archive, asana, bigquery, bitbucket,
box, clickup, datadog, dropbox, duckdb, elasticsearch, evernote, gitlab,
grafana, linkedin, logseq, mailchimp, make, mcp-bridge, metabase, mixpanel,
monday, mongodb, n8n, posthog, retool, roam, salesforce, segment, sendgrid,
snowflake, todoist, trello, webhook-receiver, zapier.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
